form.label: Network Conversations by Protocol and Port TS

table.title: Click on a row to drill down

search.query: | eval avgbits= sum_bytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sum_bytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets_in) as PacketsAmountIn sum(sum_packets_out) as PacketsAmountOut sum(sum_flow_count) as "Flow Count" perc95(avgbits) as p95 max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname exp_ip app_port_string | eval PacketsAmount = PacketsAmountIn + PacketsAmountOut | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval p95=p95/1000000 | `commas_formatting(95pct Mbps, p95, 2)` | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name app_port_string "Max Mbps" "95pct Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Flow Count" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename app_port_string as "Application Port"

table.title: Click on a row to drill down

search.query: | `tstats_20062_traffic_app_port("$exp_ip$","$nfo_hostname$","$advanced_filter$","$exp_group$","$src_ip$","$src_port$","$dest_ip$","$dest_port$","$protocol_name$","$span_token$")` | eval avgbits= sum_bytes*8/($span_int$) | eval sum_packets = sum_packets_in + sum_packets_out | stats sum(sum_bytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sum_packets) as PacketsAmount sum(sum_flow_count) as "Flow Count" perc95(avgbits) as p95 max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname exp_ip app_port_string | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval p95=p95/1000000 | `commas_formatting(95pct Mbps, p95, 2)` | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name app_port_string "Max Mbps" "95pct Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Flow Count" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename app_port_string as "Application Port"

table.title: Traffic for Application Port and Protocol for $submitted:Application Port$ reported by NFO:$NFO$ Device:$submitted:Device$

search.query: | `tstats_20062_traffic_complete("$Exp_IP$","$NFO$","$advanced_filter$","$exp_group$","$src_ip$","$src_port$","$dest_ip$","$dest_port$","$protocol_name$","$span_token$")` | eval app_port=if(((src_port<dest_port AND src_port!=0) OR dest_port==0),src_port,dest_port) | `format_port_column(app_port_string, app_port)` | search app_port_string="$Application Port$" | eval sum_bytes = sum_bytes_in + sum_bytes_out | eval sum_packets = sum_packets_in + sum_packets_out | eval avgbits= sum_bytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sum_bytes) AS TrafficAmount max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic sum(sum_packets) AS PacketsAmount sum(sum_flow_count) AS "Flow Count" perc95(avgbits) as p95 by src_ip dest_ip src_host dest_host src_port dest_port transport nfo_hostname exp_ip | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | head 100 | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval p95=p95/1000000 | `commas_formatting(95pct Mbps, p95, 2)` | `format_port_column(src_port_string, src_port)` | `format_port_column(dest_port_string, dest_port)` | eval TrafficSpeed=AverageSpeed/1000000 | eval TrafficAmount=TrafficAmount/1024/1024 | eval MaxTraffic=MaxTraffic/1000000 | `commas_formatting(Total Connections, Connections)` | `commas_formatting(Average Mbps, TrafficSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Max Mbps, MaxTraffic, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, TrafficAmount)` | `commas_formatting(Average Packets/s, PacketsSpeed, 2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Packets, PacketsAmount)` | table src_ip src_host src_port_string dest_ip dest_host dest_port_string "Max Mbps" "95pct Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Flow Count" | rename src_ip as "Source IP" | rename src_host as "Source Host" | rename src_port_string as "Source Port" | rename dest_ip as "Destination IP" | rename dest_host as "Destination Host" | rename dest_port_string as "Destination Port"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10062: Network Conversations” (syslogs with nfc_id=20062). This Module identifies and reports hosts with the most traffic (optionally all hosts). It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. For bidirectional flows the Module stitches request-reply flows inverting source and destination for flows in the opposite direction. It reports consolidated flows separating bytes/packets sent and bytes/packets received.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
